name: Brooke's Sweet Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Sweet cooking chocolate, coarsely chipped
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Cream together thoroughly butter and sugars using an electric mixer. Add egg, water, and vanilla extract and beat well. In a separate bowl, stir together flour, baking soda, and salt. Blend dry ingredients into the creamed mixture. Stir the coarsely chipped chocolate pieces into the batter by hand so they do not get too broken up. Drop spoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto greased cookie sheets. Bake for about 13 minutes. Cool on racks. Yield: 3½ dozen cookies.
